queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the risk-mitigating impact of lacking a checking account on credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Credit amount requested by the applicant.
queries.question: Determinants of default: empirical analysis of how higher requested credit amounts contribute to increased credit risk.
Credit risk drivers: empirical analysis of the relationship between extended loan duration and elevated default probability.
